mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_case (user_id, company_name, job_title, posting_date, source_type, status, is_favorite) VALUES (#{userId}, #{companyName}, #{jobTitle}, #{postingDate}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{favorite})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM application_case WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_favorite DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE application_case SET company_name = #{companyName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, posting_date = #{postingDate}, source_type = #{sourceType}, status = #{status}, is_favorite = #{favorite} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM application_case WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_posting (application_case_id, original_text, uploaded_file_url, extracted_text, source_type) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{originalText}, #{uploadedFileUrl}, #{extractedText}, #{sourceType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_posting WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_analysis (application_case_id, employment_type, experience_level, required_skills, preferred_skills, duties, qualifications, difficulty, summary) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{employmentType}, #{experienceLevel}, #{requiredSkills}, #{preferredSkills}, #{duties}, #{qualifications}, #{difficulty}, #{summary})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fit_analysis (application_case_id, fit_score, matched_skills, missing_skills, recommended_study, recommended_certificates, strategy) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{fitScore}, #{matchedSkills}, #{missingSkills}, #{recommendedStudy}, #{recommendedCertificates}, #{strategy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fit_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
